# CacheHints.None property

The conservative "no-cache" hint: a zero TTL (immediately stale) with the privacy-default Private scope (spec §13.1-e, §13.4-b). A server that does not wish to encourage caching MUST still include both fields and SHOULD set `ttlMs` to `0`; when the scope is unknown the conservative default is `private`, never `public`.

```csharp
public static CacheHints None { get; }
```
